name: Chicken with Peanut Butter Sauce
recipeIngredient: 3 Pounds Chicken, Cut Into Serving Pieces, Or
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
2. Heat oil in a frying pan and brown the chicken pieces on all sides.
3. Transfer the chicken to a large pot and keep it warm.
4. Add onions to the frying pan and saute until translucent.
5. Add curry powder and tomato sauce. Stir until smooth, then add 1 cup of broth.
6. Bring to a boil. Add parsley, thyme, and bay leaves.
7. Pour the mixture over the chicken pieces. Simmer for 1 hour, or until the chicken is tender.
8. Remove the bay leaves. Combine peanut butter with 2 cups of broth in a saucepan.
9. Season with salt and pepper. When the sauce is smooth, pour it over the chicken.
10. Simmer for 10 to 15 minutes more. Serve with rice.
